description: Record a Fiji macro named 'clean_and_segment.ijm' that automates a cleaning and segmentation workflow on the 'Blobs' sample image. The macro must perform background subtraction (rolling ball radius: 50 pixels), a median filter (radius: 2 pixels), and segmentation using the Otsu thresholding algorithm. Save the macro to ~/Fiji_Data/results/macros/clean_and_segment.ijm.
